item.title: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
item.description: Learn how GPT-5.6 powers Microsoft 365 Copilot with stronger AI capabilities across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Chat, and Cowork for faster, higher-quality work.

item.title: ChatGPT is now a partner for your most ambitious work
item.description: ChatGPT Work is an agent that can take action across your apps and files, stay with a project for hours if needed, and turn a goal into finished work.

item.title: GPT-5.6: Frontier intelligence that scales with your ambition
item.description: More intelligence from every token, stronger performance per dollar, and more capability on demand for your hardest work.

item.title: Introducing GPT-Live
item.description: A new generation of voice models for natural human-AI interaction, now powering ChatGPT Voice.

item.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
item.description: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.

item.title: New usage analytics and updated spend controls for enterprises
item.description: OpenAI introduces new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, helping organizations manage costs and scale AI with confidence.

item.title: Improving health intelligence in ChatGPT
item.description: Learn how GPT-5.5 Instant improves ChatGPT’s health and wellness responses with stronger reasoning, better context, clearer communication, and physician-informed evaluations.

item.title: Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
item.description: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.

item.title: Introducing new capabilities to GPT-Rosalind
item.description: GPT-Rosalind advances life sciences research with enhanced biological reasoning, medicinal chemistry expertise, genomics analysis, and experimental workflow capabilities.

item.title: Codex for every role, tool, and workflow
item.description: Discover new Codex plugins, sites, and annotations that help analysts, marketers, designers, investors, and other teams get more done with AI.

item.title: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now available on AWS
item.description: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now generally available on AWS, giving enterprises a new path to build with OpenAI through the AWS environments, controls, and procurement workflows they already use. Customers can get started with OpenAI on AWS and move faster from evaluation to production.

item.title: Strengthening societal resilience with Rosalind Biodefense
item.description: OpenAI launches Rosalind Biodefense, expanding trusted access to GPT-Rosalind for vetted developers and U.S. government partners advancing biodefense, public health, and pandemic preparedness through frontier AI.

item.title: A new personal finance experience in ChatGPT
item.description: Preview a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT for Pro users in the U.S. Securely connect your financial accounts and get AI-powered insights and guidance grounded in your financial context, goals, and priorities.

item.title: Work with Codex from anywhere
item.description: Use Codex anywhere with the ChatGPT mobile app. Monitor, steer, and approve coding tasks in real time across devices and remote environments.

item.title: Advancing voice intelligence with new models in the API
item.description: Explore new realtime voice models in the OpenAI API that can reason, translate, and transcribe speech, enabling more natural and intelligent voice experiences.

item.title: GPT-5.5 Instant: smarter, clearer, and more personalized
item.description: GPT-5.5 Instant updates ChatGPT’s default model with smarter, more accurate answers, reduced hallucinations, and improved personalization controls.

item.title: New ways to buy ChatGPT ads
item.description: OpenAI expands ChatGPT ads with a beta self-serve Ads Manager, CPC bidding, and enhanced measurement tools—built to protect privacy and keep conversations separate from ads.

item.title: Introducing Advanced Account Security
item.description: Introducing Advanced Account Security: phishing-resistant login, stronger recovery, and enhanced protections to safeguard sensitive data and prevent account takeover.

item.title: OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
item.description: OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.

item.title: Introducing GPT-5.5
item.description: Introducing GPT-5.5, our smartest model yet—faster, more capable, and built for complex tasks like coding, research, and data analysis across tools.

item.title: Making ChatGPT better for clinicians
item.description: OpenAI makes ChatGPT for Clinicians free for verified U.S. physicians, nurse practitioners, and pharmacists, supporting clinical care, documentation, and research.

item.title: Introducing workspace agents in ChatGPT
item.description: Workspace agents in ChatGPT are Codex-powered agents that automate complex workflows, run in the cloud, and help teams scale work across tools securely.

item.title: Introducing ChatGPT Images 2.0
item.description: ChatGPT Images 2.0 introduces a state-of-the-art image generation model with improved text rendering, multilingual support, and advanced visual reasoning.

item.title: Codex for (almost) everything
item.description: The updated Codex app for macOS and Windows adds computer use, in-app browsing, image generation, memory, and plugins to accelerate developer workflows.

item.title: The next evolution of the Agents SDK
item.description: OpenAI updates the Agents SDK with native sandbox execution and a model-native harness, helping developers build secure, long-running agents across files and tools.

item.title: Codex now offers more flexible pricing for teams
item.description: Codex now includes pay-as-you-go pricing for ChatGPT Business and Enterprise, providing teams a more flexible option to start and scale adoption.

item.title: Powering product discovery in ChatGPT
item.description: ChatGPT introduces richer, visually immersive shopping powered by the Agentic Commerce Protocol, enabling product discovery, side-by-side comparisons, and merchant integration.

item.title: Why Codex Security Doesn’t Include a SAST Report
item.description: A deep dive into why Codex Security doesn’t rely on traditional SAST, instead using AI-driven constraint reasoning and validation to find real vulnerabilities with fewer false positives.

item.title: New ways to learn math and science in ChatGPT
item.description: ChatGPT introduces interactive visual explanations for math and science, helping students explore formulas, variables, and concepts in real time.

item.title: Codex Security: now in research preview
item.description: Codex Security is an AI application security agent that analyzes project context to detect, validate, and patch complex vulnerabilities with higher confidence and less noise.

item.title: Introducing GPT-5.4
item.description: Introducing GPT-5.4, OpenAI’s most most capable and efficient frontier model for professional work, with state-of-the-art coding, computer use, tool search, and 1M-token context.

item.title: Introducing ChatGPT for Excel and new financial data integrations
item.description: OpenAI introduces ChatGPT for Excel and new financial app integrations, powered by GPT-5.4 to accelerate modeling, research, and analysis in regulated environments.

item.title: GPT-5.3 Instant: Smoother, more useful everyday conversations
item.description: GPT-5.3 Instant: Smoother, more useful everyday conversations

item.title: Introducing GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark
item.description: Introducing GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark—our first real-time coding model. 15x faster generation, 128k context, now in research preview for ChatGPT Pro users.

item.title: Introducing OpenAI Frontier
item.description: OpenAI Frontier is an enterprise platform for building, deploying, and managing AI agents with shared context, onboarding, permissions, and governance.

item.title: Introducing GPT-5.3-Codex
item.description: GPT-5.3-Codex is a Codex-native agent that pairs frontier coding performance with general reasoning to support long-horizon, real-world technical work.

item.title: The Sora feed philosophy
item.description: Discover the Sora feed philosophy—built to spark creativity, foster connections, and keep experiences safe with personalized recommendations, parental controls, and strong guardrails.

item.title: Introducing the Codex app
item.description: Introducing the Codex app for macOS—a command center for AI coding and software development with multiple agents, parallel workflows, and long-running tasks.

item.title: Retiring GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1 mini, and OpenAI o4-mini in ChatGPT
item.description: On February 13, 2026, alongside the previously announced retirement⁠ of GPT‑5 (Instant, Thinking, and Pro), we will retire GPT‑4o, GPT‑4.1, GPT‑4.1 mini, and OpenAI o4-mini from ChatGPT. In the API, there are no changes at this time.

item.title: Introducing Prism
item.description: Prism is a free LaTeX-native workspace with GPT-5.2 built in, helping researchers write, collaborate, and reason in one place.

item.title: Introducing ChatGPT Go, now available worldwide
item.description: ChatGPT Go is now available worldwide, offering expanded access to GPT-5.2 Instant, higher usage limits, and longer memory—making advanced AI more affordable globally.

item.title: OpenAI for Healthcare
item.description: OpenAI for Healthcare enables secure, enterprise-grade AI that supports HIPAA compliance—reducing administrative burden and supporting clinical workflows.

item.title: Introducing ChatGPT Health
item.description: ChatGPT Health is a dedicated experience that securely connects your health data and apps, with privacy protections and a physician-informed design.

item.title: Introducing GPT-5.2-Codex
item.description: GPT-5.2-Codex is OpenAI’s most advanced coding model, offering long-horizon reasoning, large-scale code transformations, and enhanced cybersecurity capabilities.

item.title: Developers can now submit apps to ChatGPT
item.description: Developers can now submit apps for review and publication in ChatGPT, with approved apps appearing in a new in-product directory for easy discovery. Updated tools, guidelines, and the Apps SDK help developers build powerful chat-native experiences that bring real-world actions into ChatGPT.

item.title: The new ChatGPT Images is here
item.description: The new ChatGPT Images is powered by our flagship image generation model, delivering more precise edits, consistent details, and image generation up to 4× faster. The upgraded model is rolling out to all ChatGPT users today and is also available in the API as GPT-Image-1.5.

item.title: The Walt Disney Company and OpenAI reach landmark agreement to bring beloved characters to Sora
item.description: Disney and OpenAI have reached an agreement to bring more than 200 Disney, Marvel, Pixar and Star Wars characters to Sora for fan-inspired short videos. The agreement emphasizes responsible AI in entertainment and includes Disney’s company-wide use of ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API.

item.title: Introducing GPT-5.2
item.description: GPT-5.2 is our most advanced frontier model for everyday professional work, with state-of-the-art reasoning, long-context understanding, coding, and vision. Use it in ChatGPT and the OpenAI API to power faster, more reliable agentic workflows.

item.title: Expanding data residency access to business customers worldwide
item.description: OpenAI expands data residency for ChatGPT Enterprise, ChatGPT Edu, and the API Platform, enabling eligible customers to store data at rest in-region.

item.title: Introducing shopping research in ChatGPT
item.description: Shopping research in ChatGPT helps you explore, compare, and discover products with personalized buyer’s guides that simplify decision-making

item.title: Building more with GPT-5.1-Codex-Max
item.description: Introducing GPT-5.1-Codex-Max, a faster, more intelligent agentic coding model for Codex. The model is designed for long-running, project-scale work with enhanced reasoning and token efficiency.

item.title: A free version of ChatGPT built for teachers
item.description: ChatGPT for Teachers is a secure workspace with education‑grade privacy and admin controls. Free for verified U.S. K–12 educators through June 2027.

item.title: Introducing GPT-5.1 for developers
item.description: GPT-5.1 is now available in the API, bringing faster adaptive reasoning, extended prompt caching, improved coding performance, and new apply_patch and shell tools.

item.title: Introducing group chats in ChatGPT
item.description: Collaborate with others, and ChatGPT, in the same conversation.

item.title: GPT-5.1: A smarter, more conversational ChatGPT
item.description: We’re upgrading the GPT-5 series with warmer, more capable models and new ways to customize ChatGPT’s tone and style. GPT-5.1 starts rolling out today to paid users.

item.title: Introducing gpt-oss-safeguard
item.description: OpenAI introduces gpt-oss-safeguard—open-weight reasoning models for safety classification that let developers apply and iterate on custom policies.

item.title: Work smarter with your company knowledge in ChatGPT
item.description: Company knowledge brings context from your apps into ChatGPT for answers specific to your business, with clear citations, security, privacy, and admin controls. Available now for Business, Enterprise, and Edu users.

item.title: Continue your ChatGPT experience beyond WhatsApp
item.description: ChatGPT will no longer be available on WhatsApp after January 15, 2026. Learn how to link your ChatGPT account and continue your conversations across devices.

item.title: Introducing ChatGPT Atlas, the browser with ChatGPT built in
item.description: ChatGPT Atlas, the browser with ChatGPT built it. Get instant answers, summaries, and smart web help—right from any page. With privacy settings you can control. Available now for MacOS.

item.title: Codex is now generally available
item.description: OpenAI Codex is now generally available with powerful new features for developers: a Slack integration, Codex SDK, and admin tools like usage dashboards and workspace management—making Codex easier to use and manage at scale.

item.title: Introducing apps in ChatGPT and the new Apps SDK
item.description: We’re introducing a new generation of apps you can chat with, right inside ChatGPT. Developers can start building them today with the new Apps SDK, available in preview.

item.title: Introducing AgentKit, new Evals, and RFT for agents
item.description: Today, we’re releasing new tools to help developers go from prototype to production faster: AgentKit, expanded evals capabilities, and reinforcement fine-tuning for agents.

item.title: Introducing parental controls
item.description: We’re rolling out parental controls and a new parent resource page to help families guide how ChatGPT works in their homes.

item.title: Buy it in ChatGPT: Instant Checkout and the Agentic Commerce Protocol
item.description: We’re taking first steps toward agentic commerce in ChatGPT with new ways for people, AI agents, and businesses to shop together.

item.title: More ways to work with your team and tools in ChatGPT
item.description: New shared projects, smarter connectors, and compliance and security updates help teams get more done.

item.title: Introducing ChatGPT Pulse
item.description: Today we're releasing a preview of ChatGPT Pulse to Pro users on mobile. Pulse is a new experience where ChatGPT proactively does research to deliver personalized updates based on your chats, feedback, and connected apps like your calendar.

item.title: Introducing gpt-realtime and Realtime API updates
item.description: We’re releasing a more advanced speech-to-speech model and new API capabilities including MCP server support, image input, and SIP phone calling support.

item.title: Introducing GPT-5 for developers
item.description: Introducing GPT-5 in our API platform—offering high reasoning performance, new controls for devs, and best-in-class results on real coding tasks.

item.title: GPT-5 and the new era of work
item.description: GPT-5 is OpenAI’s most advanced model—transforming enterprise AI, automation, and workforce productivity in the new era of intelligent work.

item.title: Introducing study mode in ChatGPT
item.description: Introducing study mode in ChatGPT, a new learning experience that helps you work through problems step by step, guiding students with questions, scaffolding, and feedback for deeper learning.

item.title: Introducing ChatGPT agent
item.description: Introducing ChatGPT agent: it thinks and acts, using tools to complete tasks like research, bookings, and slideshows—all with your guidance.

item.title: New tools and features in the Responses API
item.description: New tools and features in the Responses API

item.title: Introducing data residency in Asia
item.description: Data residency builds on OpenAI’s enterprise-grade data privacy, security, and compliance programs supporting customers worldwide.

item.title: Expanding on what we missed with sycophancy
item.description: A deeper dive on our findings, what went wrong, and future changes we’re making.

item.title: Sycophancy in GPT-4o: what happened and what we’re doing about it
item.description: We have rolled back last week’s GPT‑4o update in ChatGPT so people are now using an earlier version with more balanced behavior. The update we removed was overly flattering or agreeable—often described as sycophantic.

item.title: Introducing our latest image generation model in the API
item.description: Our latest image generation model is now available in the API via ‘gpt-image-1’—enabling developers and businesses to build professional-grade, customizable visuals directly into their own tools and platforms.

item.title: Introducing GPT-4.1 in the API
item.description: Introducing GPT-4.1 in the API—a new family of models with across-the-board improvements, including major gains in coding, instruction following, and long-context understanding. We’re also releasing our first nano model. Available to developers worldwide starting today.

item.title: Introducing 4o Image Generation
item.description: At OpenAI, we have long believed image generation should be a primary capability of our language models. That’s why we’ve built our most advanced image generator yet into GPT‑4o. The result—image generation that is not only beautiful, but useful.

item.title: New tools for building agents
item.description: New tools for building agents

item.title: Introducing data residency in Europe
item.description: Data residency builds on OpenAI’s enterprise-grade data privacy, security, and compliance programs supporting customers worldwide.

item.title: Introducing Operator
item.description: Introducing Operator

item.title: OpenAI o1 and new tools for developers
item.description: Introducing OpenAI o1, Realtime API improvements, a new fine-tuning method and more for developers.

item.title: Sora is here
item.description: Our video generation model, Sora, is now available to use at sora.com. Users can generate videos up to 1080p resolution, up to 20 sec long, and in widescreen, vertical or square aspect ratios. You can bring your own assets to extend, remix, and blend, or generate entirely new content from text.

item.title: Introducing ChatGPT Pro
item.description: Broadening usage of frontier AI

item.title: Introducing ChatGPT search
item.description: Get fast, timely answers with links to relevant web sources

item.title: Introducing canvas, a new way to write and code with ChatGPT.
item.description: Introducing canvas

item.title: Introducing the Realtime API
item.description: Developers can now build fast speech-to-speech experiences into their applications

item.title: Introducing vision to the fine-tuning API
item.description: Developers can now fine-tune GPT-4o with images and text to improve vision capabilities

item.title: Prompt Caching in the API
item.description: Offering automatic discounts on inputs that the model has recently seen

item.title: Model Distillation in the API
item.description: Fine-tune a cost-efficient model with the outputs of a large frontier model–all on the OpenAI platform

item.title: Upgrading the Moderation API with our new multimodal moderation model
item.description: We’re introducing a new model built on GPT-4o that is more accurate at detecting harmful text and images, enabling developers to build more robust moderation systems.

item.title: Introducing OpenAI o1
item.description: Introducing OpenAI o1

item.title: Fine-tuning now available for GPT-4o
item.description: Fine-tuning now available for GPT-4o

item.title: Introducing Structured Outputs in the API
item.description: We are introducing Structured Outputs in the API—model outputs now reliably adhere to developer-supplied JSON Schemas.

item.title: SearchGPT is a prototype of new AI search features
item.description: We’re testing SearchGPT, a temporary prototype of new search features that give you fast and timely answers with clear and relevant sources.

item.title: New compliance and administrative tools for ChatGPT Enterprise
item.description: Compliance API integrations, SCIM, and GPT controls to support compliance programs, data security, and user access at scale

item.title: Introducing OpenAI for Nonprofits
item.description: We’re launching a new initiative to enhance the accessibility of our tools for nonprofit organizations, including discounted rates for ChatGPT Team and Enterprise.

item.title: OpenAI for Education
item.description: An affordable offering for universities to responsibly bring AI to campus.

item.title: How the voices for ChatGPT were chosen
item.description: How the voices for ChatGPT were chosen We worked with industry-leading casting and directing professionals to narrow down over 400 submissions before selecting the 5 voices.

item.title: Improvements to data analysis in ChatGPT
item.description: Improvements to data analysis in ChatGPT Interact with tables and charts and add files directly from Google Drive and Microsoft OneDrive.

item.title: Introducing GPT-4o and more tools to ChatGPT free users
item.description: Introducing GPT-4o and more tools to ChatGPT free users We are launching our newest flagship model and making more capabilities available for free in ChatGPT.

item.title: Introducing ChatGPT and Whisper APIs
item.description: Introducing ChatGPT and Whisper APIs

item.title: GPT-4 API general availability and deprecation of older models in the Completions API
item.description: GPT-3.5 Turbo, DALL·E and Whisper APIs are also generally available, and we are releasing a deprecation plan for older models of the Completions API, which will retire at the beginning of 2024.

item.title: Introducing more enterprise-grade features for API customers
item.description: Increasing enterprise support with more security features and controls, updates to our Assistants API, and tools to better manage costs.

item.title: Introducing improvements to the fine-tuning API and expanding our custom models program
item.description: We’re adding new features to help developers have more control over fine-tuning and announcing new ways to build custom models with OpenAI.

item.title: Start using ChatGPT instantly
item.description: We’re making it easier for people to experience the benefits of AI without needing to sign up

item.title: Navigating the challenges and opportunities of synthetic voices
item.description: We’re sharing lessons from a small scale preview of Voice Engine, a model for creating custom voices.

item.title: Sora first impressions
item.description: Since we introduced Sora to the world last month, we’ve been working with artists to learn how Sora might aid in their creative process.

item.title: Memory and new controls for ChatGPT
item.description: We’re testing the ability for ChatGPT to remember things you discuss to make future chats more helpful. You’re in control of ChatGPT’s memory.

item.title: New embedding models and API updates
item.description: New embedding models and API updates

item.title: Introducing the GPT Store
item.description: Introducing the GPT Store

item.title: Introducing ChatGPT Team
item.description: We’re launching a new ChatGPT plan for teams of all sizes, which provides a secure, collaborative workspace to get the most out of ChatGPT at work.

item.title: New models and developer products announced at DevDay
item.description: GPT-4 Turbo with 128K context and lower prices, the new Assistants API, GPT-4 Turbo with Vision, DALL·E 3 API, and more.

item.title: Introducing GPTs
item.description: You can now create custom versions of ChatGPT that combine instructions, extra knowledge, and any combination of skills.

item.title: DALL·E 3 is now available in ChatGPT Plus and Enterprise
item.description: We developed a safety mitigation stack to ready DALL·E 3 for wider release and are sharing updates on our provenance research.

item.title: ChatGPT can now see, hear, and speak
item.description: ChatGPT can now see, hear, and speak

item.title: OpenAI partners with Scale to provide support for enterprises fine-tuning models
item.description: OpenAI’s customers can leverage Scale’s AI expertise to customize our most advanced models.

item.title: Custom instructions for ChatGPT
item.description: We’re rolling out custom instructions to give you more control over how ChatGPT responds. Set your preferences, and ChatGPT will keep them in mind for all future conversations.

item.title: Function calling and other API updates
item.description: We’re announcing updates including more steerable API models, function calling capabilities, longer context, and lower prices.

item.title: Introducing the ChatGPT app for iOS
item.description: The ChatGPT app syncs your conversations, supports voice input, and brings our latest model improvements to your fingertips.

item.title: New ways to manage your data in ChatGPT
item.description: ChatGPT users can now turn off chat history, allowing you to choose which conversations can be used to train our models.

item.title: ChatGPT plugins
item.description: We’ve implemented initial support for plugins in ChatGPT. Plugins are tools designed specifically for language models with safety as a core principle, and help ChatGPT access up-to-date information, run computations, or use third-party services.

item.title: Introducing ChatGPT Plus
item.description: We’re launching a pilot subscription plan for ChatGPT, a conversational AI that can chat with you, answer follow-up questions, and challenge incorrect assumptions.

item.title: New AI classifier for indicating AI-written text
item.description: We’re launching a classifier trained to distinguish between AI-written and human-written text.

item.title: New and improved embedding model
item.description: We are excited to announce a new embedding model which is significantly more capable, cost effective, and simpler to use.

item.title: Introducing ChatGPT
item.description: We’ve trained a model called ChatGPT which interacts in a conversational way. The dialogue format makes it possible for ChatGPT to answer followup questions, admit its mistakes, challenge incorrect premises, and reject inappropriate requests.

item.title: DALL·E API now available in public beta
item.description: Starting today, developers can begin building apps with the DALL·E API.

item.title: DALL·E now available without waitlist
item.description: New users can start creating straight away. Lessons learned from deployment and improvements to our safety systems make wider availability possible.

item.title: DALL·E: Introducing outpainting
item.description: Extend creativity and tell a bigger story with DALL·E images of any size.

item.title: New and improved content moderation tooling
item.description: We are introducing a new and improved content moderation tool. The Moderation endpoint improves upon our previous content filter, and is available for free today to OpenAI API developers.

item.title: DALL·E now available in beta
item.description: We’ll invite 1 million people from our waitlist over the coming weeks. Users can create with DALL·E using free credits that refill every month, and buy additional credits in 115-generation increments for $15.

item.title: Reducing bias and improving safety in DALL·E 2
item.description: Today, we are implementing a new technique so that DALL·E generates images of people that more accurately reflect the diversity of the world’s population.

item.title: Powering next generation applications with OpenAI Codex
item.description: Codex is now powering 70 different applications across a variety of use cases through the OpenAI API.

item.title: DALL·E 2 research preview update
item.description: Early users have created over 3 million images to date and helped us improve our safety processes. We’re excited to begin adding up to 1,000 new users from our waitlist each week.

item.title: New GPT-3 capabilities: Edit & insert
item.description: We’ve released new versions of GPT-3 and Codex which can edit or insert content into existing text, rather than just completing existing text.

item.title: Introducing text and code embeddings
item.description: We are introducing embeddings, a new endpoint in the OpenAI API that makes it easy to perform natural language and code tasks like semantic search, clustering, topic modeling, and classification.

item.title: Customizing GPT-3 for your application
item.description: Fine-tune with a single command.

item.title: OpenAI’s API now available with no waitlist
item.description: Wider availability made possible by safety progress.

item.title: OpenAI Codex
item.description: We’ve created an improved version of OpenAI Codex, our AI system that translates natural language to code, and we are releasing it through our API in private beta starting today.

item.title: GPT-3 powers the next generation of apps
item.description: Over 300 applications are delivering GPT-3–powered search, conversation, text completion, and other advanced AI features through our API.

item.title: OpenAI licenses GPT-3 technology to Microsoft
item.description: OpenAI has agreed to license GPT-3 to Microsoft for their own products and services.

item.title: OpenAI API
item.description: We’re releasing an API for accessing new AI models developed by OpenAI.
